overall_correctness.description: Overall verdict on the reviewed diff.

findings.description: Concrete, actionable findings tied to a changed file and line. Empty if the patch is clean.

file.description: Repo-relative path of a file present in the reviewed diff.

line.description: 1-based line number in the changed file the finding refers to.

severity.description: critical = bug/security/privacy/correctness; warning = should fix; info = minor.

category.description: bug = logic/correctness; privacy = network in the data path (hard rule 1); ipc-contract = hand-edited bindings or unregistered command (rule 2); unsafe = unjustified unsafe / unparameterized SQL; sql-leak = SQL or DB handle outside the repository layer (rule 4); panic-path = unwrap/expect/panic in a production path (rule 3); narrate-not-count = the AI layer computing or fabricating a number (rule 6); simplify = dead code / over-abstraction / AI-tell; style = naming/formatting/microcopy voice; test = missing or wrong test; design-system = ad-hoc color/font/spacing instead of a token (rule 7).

body.description: What is wrong, why it matters, and the concrete fix. No speculative risks or large rewrites.
